problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Telomerase. Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
